name: FACTS Grounding
capability_target: Long-form grounded response control over document evidence, without hallucinating outside supplied context.

input_contract.metadata: leaderboard/paper card only until terms and scoring path are admitted
input_contract.context: private documents with exact answer spans
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: private exact support-span answer, not model-judge score
output_contract.residuals: unsupported answer, wrong support, or false abstention

smoke_steps: do not approximate public score with external inference
use private deterministic grounded-answer analogues only
contamination_policy: FACTS public/private leaderboard material is calibration-only and not used for training. Model-judge scoring is blocked unless a local, governed deterministic proxy is explicitly admitted.
regression_policy: Private grounded-answer rows may become regression; public FACTS remains queued unless terms and evaluator path are approved.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No model-judge or teacher substitution for FACTS scoring.
